activities.details: I levelled my Runecrafting skill, I am now level 51.
I levelled my Fletching skill, I am now level 51.
I was duped into helping an assassin steal a relic from Entrana, but at least the Temple Knights are investigating these events.
I levelled my Magic skill, I am now level 61.
Completing Desert Treasure has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 80 QP milestone.
After recovering the four diamonds of Azzanadra, I found a strange being in the heart of a pyramid who taught me a thing or two about magic.
I levelled my Necromancy skill, I am now level 70.
I levelled my Constitution skill, I am now level 69.
I levelled my Defence skill, I am now level 69.
I levelled my Necromancy skill, I am now level 69.
I levelled my Defence skill, I am now level 68.
I levelled my Summoning skill, I am now level 42.
I levelled my Slayer skill, I am now level 44.
I levelled my Mining skill, I am now level 67.
Good news at last: Arrav's heart has been reclaimed and we have a chance of freeing him from Zemouregal's clutches.
activities.text: Quest complete: The Curse of Arrav

activities.details: I levelled my Constitution skill, I am now level 68.
I've reconstructed the mummy in the pyramid near Uzer, so I can now talk with her and learn ancient secrets.
I levelled my Hunter skill, I am now level 52.
Not a week goes by without Varrock becoming the target of some dark and malevolent force! I've pushed back the waves of zombies and defied Zemouregal.
I levelled my Farming skill, I am now level 30.
